utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: So the Porsche guy took his car back .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: But you found the keys to his clothes ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No . No , I just uh , I just loved the way it feels when everybody thinks I own a Porsche .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I just loved the way it feels when everybody thinks I own a Porsche .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: And people will think you own a Porsche because you are wearing the clothes ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_And people will think you own a Porsche because you are wearing the clothes ?
